calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-02-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Apearence: Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff, Nevo Mosser
Yelena Kazantseua, Agent for Plaintiff
No appearance by Defendant

This case was assigend to #218 by #206 for prove-up hearing on court trial. At 10:10am, counsel and agent were present for Plaintiff. Evidentiary document and oral testimony was heard. Exhibit one, Lease Agreement, was admiited into evidence. The court grants judgement for Plaintif and against Defendant as follows:
Judgment for restitution and possession of the premises located at 917 Folsom St. #310, SF, CA
Rents and per diem damages of $1,119.65
No attorney's fee
Costs waived
Lease forfeited
Judgment was signed in open court.
